F

fee_isDisplayed() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerEventDetailsActivityTest
Verifies that the fee text is displayed after the event loads.
feeInput - Variable in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerCreateEventActivity
 
feeInput - Variable in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerEditEventActivity
 
feeInput - Variable in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerEventDetailsActivity
 
fetchCancelledEntrants() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.CancelledFragment
Fetches all entrants with status "Cancelled" from Firestore using a real-time snapshot listener.
fetchEnrolledEntrants() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.EnrolledFragment
Fetches all entrants with status "Enrolled" from Firestore using a real-time snapshot listener.
fetchLocationAndJoin() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.event.EventDetailsActivity
Checks for location permissions, fetches the user's current coordinates, and proceeds to join the waitlist with location data attached.
fillAllRequiredFields() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerCreateEventActivityTest
Fills in all required fields with valid values.
fillFieldsUpToCapacity() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerCreateEventActivityTest
Fills in all required fields up to the capacity field.
fillFieldsUpToFee() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerCreateEventActivityTest
Fills in all required fields up to the fee field.
filterButton - Variable in class com.example.getoutthere.event.EventListActivity
 
filteredEvents - Variable in class com.example.getoutthere.event.EventListActivity
 
filterListener - Variable in class com.example.getoutthere.event.EventFilterFragment
 
formatTimestamp(Timestamp) - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerEditEventActivity
Converts a Firebase Timestamp into a formatted date and time string so it can be displayed in the input fields.
formatTimestamp(Timestamp) - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerEventDetailsActivity
Formats a Firestore Timestamp into a readable date string.
fragment_receivesEventIdArgument() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.WaitlistFragmentTest
Verifies that the fragment receives the event ID argument.
